judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue and cash flow, but currently unprofitable and trading at a high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate (0.25 vs 0.23); next earnings date 2026-07-30.
positives: Revenue growth 33.5% YoY — indicating strong market adoption.
Free cash flow $755M TTM — positive cash generation despite operating losses.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $234.18.
Total cash $4.16B provides a significant liquidity buffer.
negatives: Operating margin -9.7% and Profit margin -3.7% — the company is not yet profitable.
Forward P/E 136.88x and Price/Sales 31.69x — valuation is very high.
Debt/Equity 230.86% — significant leverage relative to equity.
Return on equity -5.9% and Return on assets -2.7% — poor returns on capital.

news.paragraph: Cloudflare (NET) is trading near $208.75, with recent headlines focused on unrelated companies like Nu Holdings reporting strong earnings. The lack of direct news for Cloudflare means traders should look to technicals and broader market trends for direction. The next earnings date is July 30th, which could serve as a catalyst.

headlines.title: Nu Holdings (NU) Reports Record Q1 2026 Revenue Surpassing $5B and $871M Net Income

examples.body: $NET I have a weird feeling this goes on an $AMD $MU $SNDK type of run very soon…
$NET Sell the news. 194 tomorrow buy the dip.
$NET we’re not gonna see the 100s again
$NET slow grind off lows gon turn into angry pump
